mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM data_products WHERE review_status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR info LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN size_label LIKE '%GB' THEN CAST(REPLACE(size_label, 'GB', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * 1024 WHEN size_label LIKE '%MB' THEN CAST(REPLACE(size_label, 'MB', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ELSE 0 END) ASC
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN size_label LIKE '%GB' THEN CAST(REPLACE(size_label, 'GB', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * 1024 WHEN size_label LIKE '%MB' THEN CAST(REPLACE(size_label, 'MB', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ELSE 0 END) DESC
ORDER BY (likes + stars) DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
